---
name: Task-Handoff
about: Hand off blocked or paused work with enough context for another contributor
  to continue.
title: 'handoff: '
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Task Summary

What were you trying to complete?

## Current State

What has already been done?

## Blocker or Reason for Handoff

What is preventing progress, or why does this need another owner?

## Files or Areas Touched

-

## Useful Context

Include commands run, errors seen, decisions made, links to branches/PRs, or screenshots.

## Suggested Next Step

What should the next person try first?
